class CfgVehicles {
    class All {};
    class Man : All {
        scope = 0;
        displayName = "$STR_DN_MAN";
    };
    class SyntheticSoldierWest : Man {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "$STR_DN_SYNTH_SOLDIER_WEST";
        side = 1;
        weapons[] = {"SyntheticRifle", "Binocular"};
    };
    class SyntheticSoldierEast : Man {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "$STR_DN_SOLDIER_EB";
        side = 0;
        weapons[] = {"AK74"};
    };
    class Tank : All {
        scope = 0;
        vehicleClass = "Armored";
    };
    class SyntheticTankAlpha : Tank {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "$STR_DN_SYNTH_TANK_ALPHA";
        model = "\Synthetic\vehicles\m1abrams.p3d";
        armor = 900;
        class Library {
            libTextDesc = "$STR_LIB_SYNTH_TANK_ALPHA";
        };
        class Turret {
            weapons[] = {"M256", "M240Coax"};
            magazines[] = {"M256_SABOT", "M240_200Rnd"};
        };
    };
};

class CfgWeapons {
    class Default {
        scope = 0;
        displayName = "";
    };
    class SyntheticRifle : Default {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "$STR_DN_SYNTH_RIFLE";
        displayNameMagazine = "$STR_DN_SYNTH_MAG";
        reloadTime = 0.1;
        modes[] = {"Single", "FullAuto"};
    };
};

class CfgDifficulty {
    skillFriendly = 0.5;
    skillEnemy = 0.8;
    labels[] = {"$STR_DIFF_EASY", "$STR_DIFF_NORMAL", "$STR_DIFF_HARD"};
};
